# CLAUDE.md

## Types: Rust → TypeScript (auto-generated)

### How it works

Frontend types are **generated automatically** from Rust structs in `backend/`.

The [`ts-rs`](https://github.com/Aleph-Alpha/ts-rs) crate reads the `#[ts(export)]` attribute on structs and generates `.ts` type files accordingly.

---

### Rule: never manually edit `frontend/src/types/`

> ⛔ The `frontend/src/types/` directory is auto-generated. Do not edit it by hand — any changes will be overwritten on the next export.

---

### Workflow when changing input/output structs

Whenever you add, modify, or remove request/response structs in `backend/`:

**1. Annotate the struct with `#[ts(export)]`**

```rust
use ts_rs::TS;

#[derive(Serialize, Deserialize, TS)]
#[ts(export)]
pub struct CreateUserRequest {
    pub name: String,
    pub email: String,
}

#[derive(Serialize, Deserialize, TS)]
#[ts(export)]
pub struct CreateUserResponse {
    pub id: u64,
    pub name: String,
}
```

**2. Run the export command from the `backend/` directory**

```bash
cd backend
cargo test export_bindings
```

This regenerates all `.ts` files in `frontend/src/types/`.

**3. Commit both files together**

Always commit the Rust source changes and the generated TypeScript together in the same commit so they stay in sync.

---

### What gets generated

Given a Rust struct like:

```rust
#[derive(Serialize, Deserialize, TS)]
#[ts(export)]
pub struct User {
    pub id: u64,
    pub name: String,
    pub email: String,
}
```

The file `frontend/src/types/User.ts` is automatically created:

```ts
// This file was generated by [ts-rs](https://github.com/Aleph-Alpha/ts-rs).
// Do not edit this file manually.

export type User = {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  email: string;
};
```

---

### Summary

| Step                                                  | What to do                                        |
| ----------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------- |
| Add/change a request or response struct in `backend/` | Add `#[ts(export)]` to the struct                 |
| Regenerate TypeScript types                           | `cd backend && cargo test export_bindings`        |
| Where types appear                                    | `frontend/src/types/` (auto-generated, read-only) |
| Manual edits to `frontend/src/types/`                 | ❌ Never — they will be overwritten               |
